description_long: This is a wooden ladder with two vertical side rails and seven horizontal rungs, one of which appears to be partially broken or missing a section. The ladder is constructed from medium-brown wood, with a slightly irregular, hand-crafted appearance, as evidenced by the non-uniform spacing and slight warping of the rails and rungs. The side rails are rectangular in cross-section and taper slightly towards the bottom. The rungs are evenly spaced except for the damaged one, which disrupts the otherwise regular pattern. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails. The overall finish is matte, with a natural wood grain texture visible throughout.
description: A medium-brown wooden ladder with seven rungs, one of which is damaged, and rectangular side rails. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible safety features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven rungs, including the damaged one near the bottom, and the full width of the side rails.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the thin, rectangular cross-section of the rails and the slight tapering towards the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the rungs and rails, with the damaged rung visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thinness and taper of the rails, with the damaged rung protruding slightly.
